quote: Whatever you do,strive to do it so well that no man living and no man dead and no man yet to be born could do it any better. – Benjamin Mays
fact: Koalas never drink water. They get fluids from the eucalyptus leaves they eat.
joke:
A panda walks into a bar and says to the bartender “I’ll have a Scotch and . . . . . . . . . . . . . . Coke thank you”. 

“Sure thing” the bartender replies and asks “but what’s with the big pause?” 

The panda holds up his hands and says “I was born with them”
